name: OpenMaps
short_desc: Cartografía libre y navegación offline sin rastreadores.
description: OpenMaps es una herramienta de mapas de código abierto diseñada para la privacidad. Permite descargar regiones completas para uso offline, búsqueda de puntos de interés (POI) y rutas en tiempo real. Sin telemetría, sin anuncios y 100% vibe-coded.

name: Ember Browser
short_desc: Modern, fast, and secure Android web browser built with Jetpack Compose.
description:
Ember is a modern, fast, and secure Android web browser designed with a focus on user experience and productivity. Built using Jetpack Compose, it offers a clean interface with advanced features that make it a powerful alternative to traditional browsers.

✨ Features
- Modern UI: Material 3 design with a custom color palette.
- Security & Privacy: Forced HTTPS, SSL certificate blocking, and granular permissions.
- Smart Navigation: Real-time suggestions and pull-to-refresh support.
- Tab Manager Pro: High-efficiency vertical list switcher.
- Integrated Ad-Blocker: Built-in blocking for common ad domains.
- Integrated TTS (Text-to-Speech): Read Page feature to narrate any article.
- Enhanced Downloads: Custom download paths and integrated manager.
- Multimedia Pro: Full support for inline video and background audio.
- Visual Data Management: Favicon support and comprehensive cleaning tools.
- Custom Home: Improved start page with quick links and smart search.
